data.name: Voronica Goes to Town: a Vore Adventure
data.detailed_description:
Eat, grow, transform!

Voronica is out of jail (for eating people) and looking for employment that makes use of her skills (eating people) and passions (eating people).

Help her to stay employed and free by carefully weighing her options, developing her stats, and, above all, keeping her well fed at all times!

With multiple transformations (caused by eating people) and wardrobe options, this extensively animated predatory life-sim will bring you hours of hilarity and voracious delight!

Gameplay follows a dating/life-sim structure where you'll be able to move freely between areas over the course of each day, managing your time and energy as you complete jobs and activities, all while trying to keep your hunger satiated without attracting too much heat!

Pursue four different relationships with seven distinct endings and over a hundred 'meals'.

Kinks

Vore

Oral

Anal 

Unbirth

Cock (Futa, optional)

Same-size

Giantess vore

Hard vore (optional)

Transformation

Breast expansion

Giantess growth

Belly growth

Cock expansion

Macrophilia / Microphilia

Furry

Female and Male prey

Corruption

Cruelty

data.short_description: Voronica's life might be easier if she ate carrots instead of people... but her boobs grow when she does, so who is to say? Take on the role of a hungry, horny bunny-girl in a world full of tiny humans (as well as more 'ambitious' meals) in this predatory vore themed life-sim!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista+
  • 處理器: 1Ghz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 4300 MB 可用空間
